text:
Giant Cyclops (, 1tsu Me Kyojin) is a card found in the Greed Island game. This is a standard card that can be obtained by the player. These cards can be placed in the player's "Free Slots".
__NOTOC__

Card Info

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
!Type:
| colspan="3" bgcolor="D6E3FF" align="center" |Free Slot Card
| bgcolor="D6E3FF" |
|-
!Name:
| bgcolor="DAFDDA" align="center" |Giant Cyclops
| align="center" | (1tsu Me Kyojin)
| bgcolor="DAFDDA" align="center" |(1st giant)
|
|-
!Number:
| colspan="3" align="center" |#572
|
|-
!
| colspan="3" align="center" |Rank: G Transformation: 333
|
|-
!Card Effect:
| colspan="3" align="center" |Summons forth a Giant Cyclops. These one-eyed giants are the largest of all Cyclops. They travel in small groups and attack anything within their territory. 
|
|-
!How to Obtain:
| colspan="3" align="center" |By finding one and defeating on in battle.
|
|}

Summary

A large pack of Giant Cyclopes roam the Greed Island badlands and when they encounter trespassers in their territory, they attack them on sight.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.572 :: 
巨人族の中で、もっとも巨大な種族。
集団での行動を好み、縄張りに入りこんできた生物を襲う。知能は低く、弱点の目を攻撃されると、意外に脆い。
|-
![Eng]
|No.572 :: Giant Cyclops 
The largest of the giants, they act in groups and attack anything that wanders into their territory. They are not very intelligent, and are incapacitated when hit in the eye. 
|}
